category_sources: source_facts.description says it extracts subsets of Boost; official Boost BCP docs describe bcp as a tool for extracting subsets of Boost.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is boost-bcp; official Boost documentation names the utility BCP.
docs_sources: Official Boost site provides BCP tool page and Boost library documentation for bcp.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated as https://github.com/boostorg/boost, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Boost docs identify bcp as a Boost subset extraction utility for C++ libraries.
